name: Singulair / Montair
source_note: Data compiled for Arogya knowledge base. Verify against 1mg.com and pharmeasy.in for live updates.
how_it_works: Cysteinyl leukotriene receptor antagonist (LTRA) that blocks LTD4, LTC4, LTE4 from binding to receptors in airways, reducing airway inflammation and bronchoconstriction.

serious: Neuropsychiatric events (agitation, depression, suicidal ideation — FDA warning)

food_interactions: Can be taken with or without food
contraindications: Not for acute asthma attacks (rescue use)
what_to_avoid: Not a rescue inhaler — must continue other controllers
Report mood changes, aggression, or suicidal thoughts immediately
storage: Store below 25°C, protect from moisture and light
